series_description: Includes any application (eligibility or claims) received by the Board for which additional information is required to be able to make a determination and has been requested but not received by the Board.
retention_statement: Paper: 5 years after the date the request for additional information to document and complete the application has been requested.

series_description: Includes any application (linked deposit or hardship) received by the Board for which additional information is required to be able to make a determination and has been requested but not received by the Board.
retention_statement: Paper: 1 year after the date the request for additional information to document and complete the application has been requested.
